description: Stabilize the wuxia-life project by restoring build and type safety, standardizing test/CI entry points, unifying state and engine pathways, and establishing a minimal regression safety net without adding new gameplay features.

userStories.title: Repository Hygiene and Artifact Isolation
userStories.description: As a developer, I want generated reports and temporary artifacts isolated from source control so that collaboration noise is reduced and reviews focus on meaningful code changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Git working tree no longer gets flooded by generated report files after test/build runs
Ignore rules cover public report artifacts and other non-source outputs
Repository artifact/output convention is documented and applied
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Standardized Validation Commands
userStories.description: As a developer, I want consistent package scripts for test, typecheck, and build so that local validation and CI validation are aligned.
acceptanceCriteria: package.json provides runnable scripts for test, typecheck, build, and aggregated test workflow
Script failures return non-zero exit codes consistently
npm test executes a valid test entrypoint
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Type System Recovery to Zero Errors
userStories.description: As a developer, I want TypeScript errors reduced to zero across components, composables, core modules, and data definitions so that compiler feedback becomes trustworthy.
acceptanceCriteria: npm run typecheck reports 0 TypeScript errors
npm run build succeeds
Core effect/type enums and field naming conventions are consistent
No implicit any remains in critical paths

userStories.title: Unified State Model and Single Engine Entry
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a single authoritative state model and one primary game engine entry path so that runtime behavior is predictable and easier to maintain.
acceptanceCriteria: GameState/PlayerState/EventRecord definitions have a single source of truth
flags/events/connections access patterns are unified
Frontend uses one engine entry path for the main flow
Event progression path is verifiable and interruptible
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Minimal Regression Baseline and CI Gate
userStories.description: As a team, I want smoke tests and CI quality gates in place so that regressions are detected before merge and release risk is reduced.
acceptanceCriteria: Smoke coverage includes start flow, event progression, choice handling, and ending flow
npm test passes on the baseline suite
CI executes typecheck + build + test for pull requests
Failing quality checks block merge
Build passes
